hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Answer and make a simple work call: hold the line, take a message, present continuous (I am calling...) -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- On the Phone
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 9 -- On the Phone

listenings.text: Hello Graziele, this is Dr. Carter. I am calling about our meeting. I am working from home today, so please call my mobile phone. The line at the office is busy. I am free after two o'clock. Please leave a message if I do not answer. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana. I am calling with a quick message. The doctor from cardiology is on the line for you. He is holding now. Can you call him back in five minutes? He wants to talk about the schedule. Thank you. Bye for now.

extra_audio.text: The phone is ringing. Graziele answers the call. She asks the caller to hold for a moment. She checks the schedule. Then she takes a message for the team.
